name: @forgeax/engine-shader-compiler
description: Build-time WGSL → wgsl/glsl/bindings 三件套 + reflection 派生 (BindGroupLayoutDescriptor[]) — 纯函数 compileShader API，AI 用户独立可复用。

bundle-size.reason: build-time tool; physical wasm size measured via @forgeax/engine-naga → @forgeax/engine-wgpu-wasm workspace baseline (D-P9). JS dist bundle size is not enforced here.

fps.reason: build-time compiler core, no runtime canvas

bench.reason: naga parse / validate / emit_reflection timing is shader-compile-time bench; pending feat-future-shader-compile-time

gate.reason: physical-isolation grep gates (check-shader-no-naga-in-dist + check-shader-runtime-deps + check-shader-no-compiler-import) are repo-root scripts wired into ci.yml lint job, not a per-package gate
